description_long: This pennant features a rectangular, tattered fabric banner suspended from a horizontal wooden rod with gold-colored end caps. The fabric is a dark grayish tone and displays a bold, stylized red symbol reminiscent of a tribal or factional insignia. The lower edge of the pennant is irregular and frayed, suggesting exposure to the elements or intentional design for a rugged appearance. The wooden rod appears sturdy and is capped with metallic-looking fittings, providing both structural support and decorative detail. The pennant is likely intended for display in an urban or fantasy-themed environment, such as on a wall, post, or above a doorway. The overall design is visually striking, with a strong contrast between the dark fabric and the vivid red graphic.
description: A rugged, dark gray pennant with a bold red symbol, suspended from a wooden rod with gold end caps and a tattered lower edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pennant, red symbol, tattered edges, and both wooden rod ends with gold caps.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the cylindrical wooden rod and gold end caps, with minimal visibility of the fabric.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the pennant and the reverse side of the red symbol.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rod and the attachment point, with the fabric mostly hidden.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant displays a large, stylized red symbol resembling a tribal or factional mark on a dark gray background. The lower edge is tattered, adding a rugged visual effect.
